title: juncus ochraceus
intro: Juncus ochraceus, also known as Yellow Rush or Soft Rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. It is native to North America and is commonly found in wetlands, marshes, and along streams. Juncus ochraceus has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional rituals and ceremonies for its purifying and protective properties.
